name: Copy button copies comment text and shows Copied confirmation
description: After a review is completed, each ready-to-paste comment box has a Copy button. Clicking it copies the text to clipboard and changes the button label to 'Copied ✓' for 2 seconds before reverting.

planSteps.description: Paste 'https://github.com/vercel/next.js/pull/1' into the PR URL input and click Analyze PR
Wait for the review report to fully load
Scroll down to the Ready-to-Paste Comments section
At least one comment box is visible with a Copy button in the top right corner of the box
Click the Copy button on the first comment box
The Copy button label changes to 'Copied ✓' immediately after clicking
After approximately 2 seconds the button label reverts back to 'Copy'
